title: WELD: The Living Spec
tagline: A specification that proves its own integrity and breeds the next conformance test from its own rules.
holy_shit: Read the spec and it does two live acts: it hashes its own source to prove it is untampered, then mints and runs a new conformance test generated from the very rule it declares.
powered_by: the-page-that-proves-itself self-hash attestation + the-test-that-breeds CPython fuzz/shrink/freeze loop + qr.mjs child-test emission
weld: The page first attests its own index.html hash, then feeds that attested rule text into a CPython fuzzer that shrinks a failing counterexample and emits a pinned child conformance test QR that re-runs verify-before-exec.
agent_scenario: When you need a living specification that can prove its own bytes and continuously generate the next executable conformance test from its current rules, with no backend.
author: kody-w + Copilot
